queries.name: list_of_struct_unwind_sort
queries.cypher: UNWIND [ struct_pack('name', 'Charlie', 'score', 70), struct_pack('name', 'Alice',   'score', 95), struct_pack('name', 'Bob',     'score', 82) ] AS s RETURN struct_extract(s, 'name') AS name, struct_extract(s, 'score') AS score ORDER BY score DESC

queries.name: list_of_struct_count
queries.cypher: RETURN list_len([ struct_pack('x', 1), struct_pack('x', 2), struct_pack('x', 3) ]) AS n

queries.name: list_of_struct_first_element
queries.cypher: RETURN struct_extract( list_element([struct_pack('v', 10), struct_pack('v', 20)], 0), 'v' ) AS first_v

queries.name: nested_struct_two_deep
queries.cypher: WITH struct_pack('inner', struct_pack('val', 42)) AS outer RETURN struct_extract(struct_extract(outer, 'inner'), 'val') AS val

queries.name: nested_struct_mixed_types
queries.cypher: WITH struct_pack('meta', struct_pack('count', 3, 'label', 'foo'), 'flag', TRUE) AS s RETURN struct_extract(struct_extract(s, 'meta'), 'label') AS label, struct_extract(s, 'flag') AS flag

queries.name: map_of_list_access
queries.cypher: WITH map(['nums', 'letters'], [[1, 2, 3], ['a', 'b']]) AS m RETURN list_element(list_element(map_extract(m, 'nums'), 0), 2) AS third_num

queries.name: map_of_list_length
queries.cypher: WITH map(['nums', 'letters'], [[1, 2, 3], ['a', 'b']]) AS m RETURN list_len(list_element(map_extract(m, 'nums'), 0))   AS nums_len, list_len(list_element(map_extract(m, 'letters'), 0)) AS letters_len

queries.name: map_keys_sorted
queries.cypher: UNWIND map_keys(map(['c', 'a', 'b'], [3, 1, 2])) AS k RETURN k ORDER BY k

queries.name: list_with_null_element
queries.cypher: RETURN list_element([1, NULL, 3], 1) IS NULL AS slot_is_null

queries.name: struct_with_null_field
queries.cypher: WITH struct_pack('a', 1, 'b', NULL) AS s RETURN struct_extract(s, 'b') IS NULL AS b_null, struct_extract(s, 'a') AS a_val

queries.name: list_transform_double_elements
queries.cypher: RETURN list_transform([1, 2, 3, 4], x -> x * 2) AS doubled

queries.name: list_transform_extract_struct_field
queries.cypher: UNWIND list_transform( [struct_pack('v', 1), struct_pack('v', 2), struct_pack('v', 3)], s -> struct_extract(s, 'v') ) AS v RETURN v ORDER BY v
